response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance of 'Kokkara' (SixTONES) at the beginning, featuring the group ReGLOSS. 2. Identified the transition screen from 01:46 to 02:05. 3. Identified the performance of 'Superstar' (Ayumu Imazu) starting at 02:06 by a ReGLOSS member. 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs, confirming original artists and obtaining full lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features two dance and vocal performances by members of the VTuber group ReGLOSS. The first segment features a group performance of 'Kokkara', and the second is a solo performance of 'Superstar' by one of the members. There is a short transition screen between the two performances.

scenes.description: A group of five performers dances to 'Kokkara'. The song title appears in the top-left corner.

Ordinary, boring Japan
First cry, Ogya, the destination is a wilderness
Can you dig for the ore sleeping deep underground?
Who knows! In this world where there is no choice but to take it or not

Even if I lose my temper, the street rolls
Born and overwhelmed
I can be so one way, so I know, I know...
I want to break this brake, I want to
I know I can't do this alone
But this is the only way, so it depends on this
Even in the wrong future, it shines for me
Let it fire!
Burning this fighting spirit, breaking that iron grid
I am helpless
It started here
Someday I may have had a childish dream
We should be able to love each other
It started from here
Yo! 1, 2, 3, 4 in order
Just as planned
Rollin' rollin'
A life of green
1, 2, 3, 4 in order
Just as planned
Rollin' rollin'
Yo! It started from here
I don't know where from here
Because the fuel itself is empty
It's a real challenge that won't be easy
Even if you want to be alone, it's full of people
Surrounding people I don't want to hear
But try standing here, people people
I'm not at fault, nothing's wrong, it's not me
I want to blame something I'm not a genius
This is not fiction, please read
I can't seem to stop even if I don't have a natural talent

I still can't decide for myself

The next time will be a comparison

scenes.description: Transition screen with text '数年後 - a few years later -'.
A solo performance of 'Superstar' by a member of ReGLOSS. Text 'Superstar, 作詞・作曲:Ayumu Imazu' appears.
